docs.title: Home
docs.text: # 👨‍🔬 One PersonMulti-Agent Laboratory  **AI-powered virtual researchers for interdisciplinary science**       🚀 View on GitHub         Learn More ↓

docs.title: 🎯 What is OnePersonLab?
docs.text:
🤖 242 AI Agents

Virtual researchers across 11 disciplines

🧪 11 Disciplines

From Biology to Computer Science

⚡ Zero Setup

Just describe your research goal

🎓 3-Tier Structure

PI → Postdoc → Students

docs.title: 🔬 Disciplines
docs.text: 🖥️ Computer Science 🧪 Chemistry 🧬 Biology 🔩 Materials ⚙️ Engineering 🌍 Environmental 🌾 Agriculture 🏥 Medicine 📈 Economics 🧠 Psychology 📊 Data Science

docs.title: 💻 Quick Start
docs.text:
# Install universal skills
clawhub install memory-setup
clawhub install tavily-search
clawhub install academic-research-hub
clawhub install self-improving
clawhub install find-skills
clawhub install nano-pdf

You are now the Lab-Director of my OnePersonLab.
I want to build an AI-driven drug discovery platform.

That's it. Your team is ready.
